If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Operator gallery: Amiya From Arknights Terra Wiki < [Amiya](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya "Amiya") [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#searchInput) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya "Amiya") | [File](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/File "Amiya/File") | [Story](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Story "Amiya/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Overview "Amiya/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Dialogue "Amiya/Dialogue") | Gallery | [Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Trivia "Amiya/Trivia") | | | | | --- | --- | | [Guard](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Guard/Gallery "Amiya/Guard/Gallery") | [Medic](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Medic/Gallery "Amiya/Medic/Gallery") | ## Contents - [1Skins](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#Skins) - [2Outfits](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#Outfits) - [3Sprites](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#Sprites) - [4Miscellaneous](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#Miscellaneous) - [4.1Promotional material](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#Promotional_material) - [4.2Concept art](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery#Concept_art) ## Skins\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Skins")\] | Base | | --- | | ![Amiya.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Amiya.png?37fb56) | The outfit Amiya wears most often. The size of the coat indicates it belonged to someone else.
It has been fixed a couple of times, but it still shows signs of wear. | | Elite 1 | | --- | | ![Amiya Elite 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Amiya_Elite_1.png?969418) | The outfit Amiya wears most often. The size of the coat indicates it belonged to someone else. Despite that, the meticulous repairs she's done on it makes it look as good as new. | | Elite 2 | | --- | | ![Amiya Elite 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Amiya_Elite_2.png?b7b925) | This coat needs to be mended,
and the wounds still need to heal. | ## Outfits\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Outfits")\] | Newsgirl | | --- | | ![Amiya Skin 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Amiya_Skin_1.png?a85ed2) | One of Amiya's favorite outfits.
_The sky of [Londinium](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Londinium "Londinium") is always gray._
Test Collection/Newsgirl. Available only in certain regions, this remake of a classic design utilizes the best materials and contains carefully-sewn details. An extra custom-made letter opener is included.
**How to obtain:**
- [Opening Event Part 2](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Opening_Event_Part_2 "Opening Event Part 2") (Event Mission)
- [Permanent Trade Center](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Permanent_Trade_Center "Permanent Trade Center") (since [Contingency Contract Barrenland](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Contingency_Contract_Barrenland "Contingency Contract Barrenland"), 300 [![Contract Bounty](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Contract_Bounty_icon.png/20px-Contract_Bounty_icon.png?3fe8b5)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Contract_Bounty "Contract Bounty"))
- [Babel](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Babel_(event) "Babel (event)") (Motorized Logistical Camp, 500 [![Raw Sugar Lumps](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Raw_Sugar_Lumps.png/22px-Raw_Sugar_Lumps.png?eb7657)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Raw_Sugar_Lumps "Raw Sugar Lumps"))
- [Certificate Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Certificate_Store "Certificate Store") (since [Absolved Will Be the Seekers](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Absolved_Will_Be_the_Seekers "Absolved Will Be the Seekers"), 40 [![Distinction Certificate](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Distinction_Certificate_icon.png/20px-Distinction_Certificate_icon.png?c028a0)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Distinction_Certificate "Distinction Certificate") or 400 [![Universal Certificate](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Universal_Certificate_icon.png/20px-Universal_Certificate_icon.png?91091c)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Universal_Certificate "Universal Certificate")) | | Fresh Fastener | | --- | | ![Amiya Skin 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Amiya_Skin_2.png?4f95a0) | One of Amiya's casual outfits.
_The mysterious shopkeeper signed a dream-like agreement with the young lass, Amiya, hoping that she would be able to deliver love and piping-hot food to every customer._
Test Collection Series/Fresh Fastener. An outfit worn by Amiya while working for a [Rhodes Island](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rhodes_Island "Rhodes Island") restaurant. This poofy coat is cold-resistant, and has enough room to hold something penguin-sized.
**How to obtain:**
- [1st Anniversary Celebration](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/1st_Anniversary_Celebration "1st Anniversary Celebration") (Login Event, Day 14)
- [Secret Sanctuary](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Secret_Sanctuary "Secret Sanctuary") (since [Contingency Contract Base Point](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Contingency_Contract_Base_Point "Contingency Contract Base Point"), 300 [![Contract Bounty](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Contract_Bounty_icon.png/20px-Contract_Bounty_icon.png?3fe8b5)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Contract_Bounty "Contract Bounty"))
- [The Masses' Travels](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/The_Masses%27_Travels "The Masses' Travels") (Sweet Dream Hall, 500 [![Enlightened Pacifier](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Enlightened_Pacifier.png/18px-Enlightened_Pacifier.png?61fbb9)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Enlightened_Pacifier "Enlightened Pacifier"))
- [Certificate Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Certificate_Store "Certificate Store") (since [Act or Die](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Act_or_Die "Act or Die"), 40 [![Distinction Certificate](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Distinction_Certificate_icon.png/20px-Distinction_Certificate_icon.png?c028a0)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Distinction_Certificate "Distinction Certificate") or 400 [![Universal Certificate](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Universal_Certificate_icon.png/20px-Universal_Certificate_icon.png?91091c)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Universal_Certificate "Universal Certificate")) | | Seedsower | | --- | | ![Amiya Skin 3.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Amiya_Skin_3.png?ef1291) | One of Amiya's casual outfits.
_Planting, fostering, all for tomorrow._
Test Collection Series/Seedsower. A loose yet comfortable outdoors fit. Comes with an exclusive miniature mountain-grade rucksack and an agricultural nursery kit. The designer has one small wish of her own, and hopes that we can all help to realize it.
**How to obtain:** Code redemption from purchasing _[Arknights Official Artworks Volume 1](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Official_Artworks#Volume_1 "Arknights Official Artworks")_ | ## Sprites\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Sprites")\] - Amiya's Base Sprite - Amiya's _Newsgirl_ Outfit Sprite - Amiya's _Fresh Fastener_ Outfit Sprite - Amiya's _Seedsower_ Outfit Sprite ## Miscellaneous\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery?action=edit§ion=4 "Edit section: Miscellaneous")\] - [![The younger Amiya with her eyes covered by her bangs](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_%28young%2C_covered%29.png/200px-Amiya_%28young%2C_covered%29.png?38bd68)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_(young,_covered).png "The younger Amiya with her eyes covered by her bangs") The younger Amiya with her eyes covered by her bangs - [![The younger Amiya, possessed by Theresa's consciousness. Note the change on her eye colors, resembling Theresa's](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_%28young%2C_possessed%29.png/200px-Amiya_%28young%2C_possessed%29.png?ff8490)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_(young,_possessed).png "The younger Amiya, possessed by Theresa's consciousness. Note the change on her eye colors, resembling Theresa's") The younger Amiya, possessed by [Theresa](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Theresa "Theresa")'s consciousness. Note the change on her eye colors, resembling Theresa's - [![Amiya's summer outfit during Heart of Surging Flame](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_summer.png/200px-Amiya_summer.png?b50e78)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_summer.png "Amiya's summer outfit during Heart of Surging Flame") Amiya's summer outfit during [Heart of Surging Flame](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Heart_of_Surging_Flame "Heart of Surging Flame") - [![Amiya's official render from Arknights: Prelude to Dawn](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_Anime_Render.png/146px-Amiya_Anime_Render.png?ec77ed)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_Anime_Render.png "Amiya's official render from Arknights: Prelude to Dawn") Amiya's official render from _[Arknights: Prelude to Dawn](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights:_Prelude_to_Dawn "Arknights: Prelude to Dawn")_ - [![Amiya's Beta sprite, slightly different from her final design.](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya%27s_Beta_Sprite.png/104px-Amiya%27s_Beta_Sprite.png?c86269)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya%27s_Beta_Sprite.png "Amiya's Beta sprite, slightly different from her final design.") Amiya's Beta sprite, slightly different from her final design. - [![Amiya as an NPC in Limbus Company](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_Limbus_Company_Sprite.png/85px-Amiya_Limbus_Company_Sprite.png?b892e9)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_Limbus_Company_Sprite.png "Amiya as an NPC in Limbus Company") Amiya as an NPC in [_Limbus Company_](https://limbuscompany.wiki.gg/wiki/Episode_Arknights_-_EX:_Pilgrimage_of_Compassion) - [![Amiya's outfit for the 5th Anniversary's "With You" event at the TOKYO BIG SIGHT convention center](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_5th_Anniversary_Fest.png/82px-Amiya_5th_Anniversary_Fest.png?38b9e2)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_5th_Anniversary_Fest.png "Amiya's outfit for the 5th Anniversary's \"With You\" event at the TOKYO BIG SIGHT convention center") Amiya's outfit for the 5th Anniversary's "With You" event at the TOKYO BIG SIGHT convention center - [![Amiya, Ray and Haruka's outfit from the official Idol-themed merchandise released on May 31st, 2026. Drawn by @hkhkfwfw.](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Idol_Merchandise_Concept_Art.png/200px-Idol_Merchandise_Concept_Art.png?e66214)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Idol_Merchandise_Concept_Art.png "Amiya, Ray and Haruka's outfit from the official Idol-themed merchandise released on May 31st, 2026. Drawn by @hkhkfwfw.") Amiya, [Ray](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ray "Ray") and [Haruka](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Haruka "Haruka")'s outfit from the official Idol-themed merchandise released on May 31st, 2026. Drawn by @hkhkfwfw. ### Promotional material\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Gallery?action=edit§ion=5 "Edit section: Promotional material")\] - [![Amiya featured in one of the teasers prior to the game's beta in 2017, drawn by Wei@W; Notice Babel's logo above her.](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Arknights_Beta_Teaser_A.png/112px-Arknights_Beta_Teaser_A.png?80555c)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Arknights_Beta_Teaser_A.png "Amiya featured in one of the teasers prior to the game's beta in 2017, drawn by Wei@W; Notice Babel's logo above her.") Amiya featured in one of the teasers prior to the game's beta in 2017, drawn by [Wei@W](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wei@W "Wei@W"); Notice [Babel](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Babel "Babel")'s logo above her. - [![Amiya's teaser for the game's "Awakening" beta test on the CN server](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_Beta_Teaser.png/103px-Amiya_Beta_Teaser.png?6d0166)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_Beta_Teaser.png "Amiya's teaser for the game's \"Awakening\" beta test on the CN server") Amiya's teaser for the game's _"Awakening"_ beta test on the CN server - [![Amiya's introduction prior to the game's EN server release.](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Amiya_operator_introduction.png/160px-Amiya_operator_introduction.png?33f723)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Amiya_operator_introduction.png "Amiya's introduction prior to the game's EN server release.")
